raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right arm can reach the right side of box_1 without colliding with the tabletop. Contacting box_1 on its right side is feasible despite box_2 being attached, and avoids the cup_1 region in front of box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is laterally constrained by the right end-effector, reducing the risk of the attached box_2 shifting during the subsequent lift."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms have sufficient clearance to contact the outer left and right faces of box_1; the cup_1 in front of box_2 is not in the sweep/lift path; box_2 being attached does not block access to box_1’s outer faces.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely clamped between both end-effectors and lifted off the table (with box_2 potentially co-lifting due to attachment)."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The right arm can reach the right side of box_1 without colliding with the tabletop. Contacting box_1 on its right side is feasible despite box_2 being attached, and avoids the cup_1 region in front of box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is laterally constrained by the right end-effector, reducing the risk of the attached box_2 shifting during the subsequent lift.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms have sufficient clearance to contact the outer left and right faces of box_1; the cup_1 in front of box_2 is not in the sweep/lift path; box_2 being attached does not block access to box_1’s outer faces.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely clamped between both end-effectors and lifted off the table (with box_2 potentially co-lifting due to attachment).
